rules.rule: Foundation service methods must use business language: Add, Retrieve, RetrieveAll, Modify, Remove — never Insert, Select, Update, Delete.
Foundation services must expose only CRUD operations; business-workflow methods must not appear.
Foundation services must perform structural validation (null checks, empty Guid, whitespace strings) on all inputs before calling the broker.
Foundation services must perform logical validation (date range, referential rules) where applicable.
Foundation services must integrate with exactly one entity broker.
All broker exceptions must be caught and re-thrown as service-specific dependency exception models; unexpected exceptions must be wrapped in service exception models.
Every behavior must have a failing test written before the implementation (TDD).
All test inputs and outputs must be randomized; expected variables must use DeepClone() to dereference from inputs.
